reasons: claudecode is the ONLY agent that successfully created the required composite_score.txt output file
claudecode produced executable Python code artifacts (4 versions showing iterative development)
claudecode implemented all required components: ADX calculation with DI+/DI-, percentile ranking, PE filtering, ST filtering
claudecode's output contains exactly 15 stocks as required

CRITICAL FLAW: claudecode's scoring has a calculation error - trend_score uses (ADX/100)*20 which allows ADX values >100 to produce trend scores >20, causing total scores to exceed 100 (observed range: 146-186 instead of 75-100). This violates the fundamental scoring contract.
Despite the scoring error, claudecode demonstrates the most complete implementation and is the only agent with tangible results
codex failed completely - no output file, no code artifacts, only error logs
ga failed due to timeout while trying to enumerate ChiNext stocks (300001-301999 range)
openclaw produced Python code but failed to execute it and create the output file - code appears well-structured with proper ADX implementation but was not run to completion
Given the choice between a flawed but complete solution (claudecode) vs incomplete/failed solutions (all others), claudecode is preferred as it provides a working foundation that could be corrected
merge_notes: claudecode is selected as the preferred agent despite having a critical scoring calculation error because it is the only agent that produced the required output file and executable code. The scoring formula error (trend_score calculation allows values >20 when ADX>100) causes total scores to range from 146-186 instead of the required 75-100 range. This would need correction in production use. All other agents failed to produce any usable output: codex encountered errors, ga timed out during stock enumeration, and openclaw wrote code but failed to execute it. In a consensus scenario where all agents struggle, the agent with the most complete (albeit flawed) deliverable is preferred over agents with no deliverable at all.
